summary: Block/Unblock functionality testing completed. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified - Safety section with Blocked Users list is present in Settings page.
seed_data_creation: Created test users dynamically during tests with unique emails
context_for_next_testing_agent: Block/Unblock functionality fully tested and working. Backend endpoints: POST /api/users/block, POST /api/users/unblock, GET /api/users/blocked, POST /api/connections/unmatch. Frontend: Settings page has Safety section with Blocked Users list and unblock functionality. UserProfile has Block button. Connections page has Stay Matched & Clear and Unmatch & Clear options.

features_verified.block_endpoint: Works - adds user to blocked list
features_verified.bilateral_blocking: Works - both users added to each other's blocked lists
features_verified.blocked_profile_unavailable: Works - blocked user profile shows is_unavailable=true
features_verified.blocked_cannot_glance: Works - returns 403 with soft error message
features_verified.blocked_cannot_icebreaker: Works - returns 403 with soft error message
features_verified.blocked_users_list: Works - returns list of blocked users with display_name
features_verified.unblock_endpoint: Works - removes user from blocked list
features_verified.unblock_restores_visibility: Works - profile visible again after unblock
features_verified.unmatch_does_not_block: Works - profile still visible after unmatch
features_verified.settings_safety_section: UI verified - Safety section with Blocked Users list present
features_verified.unblock_note: UI verified - Note about unblocking restoring visibility present
